description: Output container for the recall machinery: items + redaction summary + exclusion summary + content-addressed pack_hash. Sub-component shapes inlined per the locked v8.5.0 de-scope decision. Hash verification is a consumer obligation surfaced via the unverified-obligations manifest (integrity_deferred).

pack_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this pack (UUID v4).

recall_request_ref.description: FK to RecallRequest.request_id; the request that produced this pack.

items.description: Per-item inline records (see RecallItem inline shape above).
Inline RecallItem shape. Sub-components are inlined within RecallPack per the locked v8.5.0 de-scope decision; promoting to a standalone $id can land strict-additively in v8.5.x or v8.6.0.

item_id.description: Consumer-side identifier for the recalled artifact.

payload_ref.description: Consumer-side reference to the payload bytes. Hounfour does not dereference; the consumer resolves it against its own object store.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the artifact was originally recorded.

total_redacted.description: Count of items redacted from the recall pack.

redaction_categories.description: Consumer-defined category names for the redactions applied.

total_excluded.description: Count of items excluded from the recall pack (e.g., privileged + legal-hold).

exclusion_categories.description: Consumer-defined category names for the exclusions applied.

pack_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest (lowercase) of safeCanonicalize(pack-minus-pack_hash). NFC + RFC 8785 + 100KB cap per the hashing-spec freeze. Library does NOT verify; consumer-side reconciliation is required.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the pack was assembled.

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this pack was authored against.
